gates.name: item_count
gates.description: Batch must contain exactly 4 bot comment templates (one per trigger)

gates.name: word_count
gates.description: Each template must be 30 words or fewer

gates.name: variable_presence
gates.description: Each template must contain at least one variable placeholder
gates.error_message: Only {actual} templates contain a variable placeholder (need 4)

gates.name: no_dev_slang
gates.description: No dev slang (LGTM, nit, etc.) in templates

params.pattern: (?i)(as an ai|i am a bot|i'm automated|i am automated|as a language model|i'm an ai|i am an ai)
